eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Washington; at 9:11 AM on APR 23, 2019 Effective until 10:11 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the AMBER Alert System. We have just received this important information regarding an abducted child in Spokane County. The Spokane County Sheriff�s Office is looking for a child who was last seen at 12808 East Blossey Avenue in the Spokane Valley and is believed to be in danger. The child�s name is Ethan Robertson. He is five years old with brown hair and brown eyes weighing 30 pounds and was last seen wearing blue pajamas, an orange Niike t-shirt and black Adidas shorts. Authorities say the child may be in the company of Justin P Robertson, who is a 42 year old white male, five feet nine inches tall, weighing 205 pounds with green eyes and a goatee beard. He was last seen wearing a green Adidas t-shirt and black Adidas shorts. They may be traveling in a 2014 red Subaru Legacy with Washington license plate APN 2450. The direction of travel is unknown at this time. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please call 911 or contact the Spokane County Sheriffs Office immediately at 509-456-2233.
